titleStmt.title: SII 6.231: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 231. (A.R. No. 262-A of 1897). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
braṁhīyāṁsyamarēśvarassa diśatu śrē
yāṁsivōyatparāḥ puṇyaṁ jñā(ṁ)ndhiṣaṇāṁ
yaśōvasukulaṁkṣmāṁ dyāṁ pri�ṇyakṣaraṁ .
saṁtanvaṁtyanuraṁjayaṁti vimalīkurvvaṁ
ti vistārayaṁtyācinvaṁti punaṁtyavaṁtyadhiva
saṁtyaṁcaṁti viṁdaṁti ca . sarvvaissurairmmuni
bhirapyabhipūjitasya dakṣasya yaccaraṇa
paṁkajabhaktyabhāvāt . dharmmaḥ prakṛṣṭaduri
tādapi duṣphalōbhūdvaṁdāmahē tamamarē
śvaramādidēvaṁ . brahmāṁḍabudbudapayōdhi
rapāstadōṣadhyānaikatānamunimānasabhṛṁga
bhūtaḥ . sraṁrakṣatu bhramatamisrasahasrara
śmirddēvōrccitāṁghriramarai ramarēśvarō vaḥ .
saṁtassaṁtatadharmmanirmmalatamā yōgābhi
yōgānvitā dhvastāṁtastamasaspamastavi
ṣayavyāvṛttadhīvṛttayaḥ . vēdāṁtaprati
pādyamādyamamitaṁ jyōtirmmayannirmma
laṁ yaṁ dhyāyaṁti tamiṁdumaulimatu
lānaṁdāya vaṁdāmahē . vijñātā nikhi
lasya caryyavibhavō dātāra Udbhāsita
sthēmānaḥ prathitadviṣatpurabhidō gīrvvā
ṇavarggapriyaḥ . yuddhēṣūgratarā ni
raṁtaramahānaṁdālaya� �viśśō
bhā vō vilasanmahāḥ pradadatāṁ śarmmā
marēśassadā . sētuḥ puṁsāṁ bhavajala
nidhau karmmavarggasya kētuḥ prītyā baṁddhussa
kalayamināṁ sarvvalōkasyahētuḥ . mau
lau rājacchatadhṛtiśirōdhāturatyāditē
yātyuccairyyāturjjayati śubhadassa
tprabhāvō mahēśaḥ . cakṣuryyasya śa
śī ravirhutava hōpyugrāsurā ya
dviṣō babhruryyasya bhṛśaṁ priyassuraga
ṇā yatpūjayāgryāṁ śriyaṁ . Ū
hē yanmahimaiti nō viṣayatāṁ vē
dairhayairyyadrathaścakrē yō dyupadā
ṁvarastribhuvanaṁ yēnēśvarōvyātsa vaḥ .
Imē trayaḥ ślōkāḥ kramēṇavacanaślēṣa
subvibhaktiślēṣasuptijvibhaktiśleṣāḥ .
visphūrjjatpaṭudhāmacakraruciraṁ śaśva
nmahōmānvayaṁ prakhyātaṁ balidarppakō
nnati prauḍhaṁ dvijēśāśrayaṁ . Abhyu
dyadbahusatvagō parivṛḍādhiṣṭhāyinaṁ
rakṣatu prītaḥ kētanṛpaṁ sadā tripurajidvi
ṣṇōssamaṁ svasya ca . tryartthaḥ . Arccā
rccatyarccati jagattuṣṭastuṣṭēti yaṁ
stutē . Adhīhyadhīhityadhyēti sa ja
yatyamarēśvaraḥ . jaya bhālagabhī
mākṣa kṣā hitamatāṁgaja . rajatā
garatāvēdya mārāṭōpajitāntaka .
Iti śivastutiḥ prātilōmyēna ślōkāṁtaraṁ
brahmaviṣṇuśivastutiḥ Aṣṭayōgānulōmya
prātilōmya praśāsyatē ślōkadvayaṁ śivastutiḥ
Atra gatvā mahādēvaṁ pratyāgatya sutatrayaṁ .
taṁpratyāgartthābhyāṁ punarddēvaṁ śivaṁ stuvē .
Digital edition of SII 6.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
